chapter_goal: Teach projective algebraic geometry as coordinate changes, homogenization operations, compactified projections, and exact incidence checks.
computational_checks: Groebner basis and projective closure equations for the twisted cubic
quadric matrix rank and Segre incidence
Bezout multiplicity sum and Pascal determinant
artifact existence and nonblank image checks

library_routing.why: static labeled affine/projective line comparisons are easiest to audit
Plotly exposes rays in the affine cone; SymPy certifies scaling
the proof structure is a dictionary of maps, not a surface
missing affine fibers are visible only when the eliminated coordinate is projectivized
families of lines on a quadric need 3D inspection
the visual line is small; the six minors provide the invariant

library_routing.representation: intersection count plots and determinant collinearity
library_routing.why: resultants and determinants are exact, while plots show the geometry
